name: agentera
description: Compound agent orchestration suite — 12 capabilities in one bundled skill; exact bare hej belongs to the bundled agentera dashboard path

interface.shortDescription: Portable skills that give Codex exact bare hej routing, project memory, planning, execution, and review workflows.
interface.longDescription: Agentera turns Codex into a coordinated engineering partner with shared project artifacts, decision memory, planning, autonomous execution, audits, documentation, visual identity, research, optimization, and orchestration. A complete user message exactly `hej` belongs to the bundled agentera skill and its agentera hej dashboard path, not the legacy hej bridge.
defaultPrompt: Use $agentera to inspect this project and suggest the next best action. If the complete user message is exactly `hej`, use $agentera's hej dashboard path.

codex.invocationHint: Use $agentera for explicit invocation. If the complete user message is exactly `hej`, route it through $agentera and the hej dashboard path; $hej is only a legacy explicit bridge.
limitations: profilera collects bounded Codex session corpus data when present and reports any absent source families in corpus metadata.

AGENTERA_HOME must be set in ~/.codex/config.toml under [shell_environment_policy].set as the app home so SKILL.md helper-script invocations resolve through $AGENTERA_HOME/app; see README install instructions.

agentera.singleSkillInstall: Single-skill installs keep core SKILL.md workflow behavior; suite tools are bundle-only enhancements.

limitations: codex_hooks ships stable and default-on as of v0.124.0 (2026-04-23). The bundled hooks/codex-hooks.json wires apply_patch PreToolUse and PostToolUse handlers per openai/codex#18391 (merged 2026-04-22).

The shipped Codex hook config validates touched artifact paths through hooks/validate_artifact.py, but it does not reconstruct final patch content for hard-gate validation. SessionStart and Stop are supported by the runtime but are not wired by the bundled config.

unsupportedEvents.reason: Claude Code-specific lifecycle event with no Codex equivalent.
Claude Code-specific lifecycle event with no Codex equivalent.
Claude Code-specific lifecycle event with no Codex equivalent.

skillMetadata.name: agentera
skillMetadata.description: Compound agent orchestration suite — 12 capabilities in one bundled skill; use for exact bare hej dashboard routing
skillMetadata.invocationHint: $agentera; for a complete bare `hej`, use the agentera hej dashboard path

skillMetadata.name: hej
skillMetadata.description: Legacy Agentera v1 explicit $hej bridge to the v2 $agentera upgrade flow; do not use for bare text hej.
skillMetadata.invocationHint: $hej only when explicitly requested as a legacy bridge; bare text hej belongs to $agentera
